examples: Upon arrival you will have the local kampong style breakfast.

Just a few metres from the shore is a tiny kampong with a few restaurants, all set in traditional, single-storey wooden shops.
He came from the Kampong Cham province in central Cambodia and died after developing fever, coughing and difficulty breathing earlier this month.
